{"name": "Commemorative Exhibition NFT | Beijing 2026", "image": "https://divenci-files.s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/789dfa36-1223-44e1-b8da-ccf9cc0a20ee.pdf", "link": "https://divenci.com", "description": "

Legacy of the Artist \\u2013 Angel Gustavo

Commemorative Exhibition NFT | Beijing 2026

This commemorative NFT celebrates the exhibition \\u201cLegacy of the Artist: Angel Gustavo\\u201d, held at Yindi Art Museum \\u2013 Art Space (B1), Beijing, from March 8 to April 28, 2026.

Created as a digital tribute to honor the enduring artistic spirit of Angel Gustavo, this NFT immortalizes a landmark cultural event that brought together collectors, art institutions, and admirers to celebrate the life, mastery, and visionary universe of the artist.

Angel Gustavo\\u2019s work stands at the intersection of impressionism, expressionism, and surrealism, combining deep technical mastery with bold creative force. His paintings are known for their powerful symbolism, vivid color spectrum, sculptural 3D illusion effects, and dynamic compositions that appear to transcend the frame and enter the viewer\\u2019s space.

This exhibition highlighted:

Monumental works dedicated to the majestic white rhinoceros, symbolizing strength, resilience, and protection.

The iconic \\u201cVenus\\u201d collection, celebrating feminine power, liberation, and vivid emotional expression.

Masterpieces exploring freedom, ancestral memory, love, and spiritual elevation.

The commemorative NFT serves as:

A permanent digital certificate of this historic exhibition

A bridge between traditional fine art and Web3 innovation

A collectible symbol of cultural dialogue between Europe and China

A tribute to the timeless legacy of Angel Gustavo

By minting this NFT, collectors become part of the ongoing narrative of the artist\\u2019s legacy \\u2014 preserving not only artworks, but a moment in art history.

Edition: Commemorative Release

Year: 2026

Event: Beijing Exhibition \\u2013 Yindi Art Museum
